{{Quote|Maybe... maybe the Jedi will accept us. I've seen how evil the dark side is. Maybe I could try.|Thalia to [[Revan/Legends|Revan]]|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Thalia May''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] student who attended the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] during the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
Thalia May and a group of fellow students from the [[Sith Academy (Korriban)|Sith Academy]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]] refused to execute a group of civilians from the nearby [[Dreshdae]] colony on the orders of [[Headmaster/Legends|Headmaster]] [[Uthar Wynn]]. In response, Uthar ordered the students executed as punishment. Before the sentence could be carried out, May and her companions escaped into the nearby [[shyrack cave]]. No one from the Academy was willing to brave the dangers of the caves to find them and carry out Master Uthar's order.

{{Gamemechanics|Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic}}
This was the case until [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] arrived on Korriban during his quest to locate the [[Star Forge]]. Revan [[Death/Legends|killed]] the resident [[Terentatek/Legends|terentatek]] in the cave, allowing May and her friends to escape off-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] via a passage to the surface. Before leaving, May expressed her thanks to Revan and her wishes to seek guidance in the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]].
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
If the player character is a [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark-sider]], then they can go into the caves and agree to "do this the hard way" when May declares she'd rather die than go back to the Academy. Unwilling to go without a fight, May and her companions open fire and are mercilessly cut down.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
